ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sales_transactions" (
  "receipt_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the sales receipt */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the transaction */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the store where the transaction occurred */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the customer who made the purchase */,
  "payment_type" TEXT /* Type of payment used for the transaction */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the employee who processed the transaction */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the transaction */,
  "discount_applied" REAL /* Discount applied to the transaction */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount for the transaction */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., completed, refunded, canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("receipt_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_transactions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_transactions_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_transactions_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction item */,
  "receipt_id" TEXT /* Reference to the sales receipt */,
  "item_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the item */,
  "quantity" REAL /* Quantity of the item sold */,
  "unit_buying_price" REAL /* Price at which the item was bought */,
  "unit_selling_price" REAL /* Price at which the item was sold */,
  "unit_price_margin" REAL /* Margin made on the item */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Discount applied to the item */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount for the item */,
  "is_returned" INTEGER /* Indicates if the item has been returned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_items_receipt_id FOREIGN KEY ("receipt_id") REFERENCES sales_transactions ("receipt_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_items_item_code FOREIGN KEY ("item_code") REFERENCES items ("item_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store */,
  "store_name" TEXT /* Name of the store */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the store */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the manager of the store */,
  "opening_time" TEXT /* Opening time of the store */,
  "closing_time" TEXT /* Closing time of the store */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the store */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points accumulated by the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "signup_date" TEXT /* Date the customer signed up */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "items" (
  "item_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the item */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the item */,
  "buying_price" REAL /* Price at which the item is bought */,
  "selling_price" REAL /* Price at which the item is sold */,
  "margin" REAL /* Margin made on the item */,
  "reorder_level" REAL /* Stock level at which a reorder should be initiated */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the supplier of the item */,
  "last_stock_update" TEXT /* Date of the last stock update */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the item's image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_items_category FOREIGN KEY ("category") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Full name of the manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the manager */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the store managed by the manager */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the manager */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the manager (e.g., Store Manager, Assistant Manager) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_managers_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loyalty_program" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the loyalty program entry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "points_earned" INTEGER /* Points earned by the customer */,
  "rewards_claimed" INTEGER /* Rewards claimed by the customer */,
  "points_expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the points expire */,
  "last_points_earned_date" TEXT /* Date the points were last earned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loyalty_program_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment transaction */,
  "receipt_id" TEXT /* Reference to the sales receipt */,
  "payment_type" TEXT /* Type of payment */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  "payment_gateway" TEXT /* Payment gateway used (e.g., PayPal, Credit Card, Debit Card) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_receipt_id FOREIGN KEY ("receipt_id") REFERENCES sales_transactions ("receipt_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "item_code" TEXT /* Reference to the item */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the store */,
  "quantity_on_hand" REAL /* Current quantity of the item in stock */,
  "reorder_status" TEXT /* Indicates if the item needs to be reordered */,
  "last_reorder_date" TEXT /* Date of the last reorder */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the supplier of the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_item_code FOREIGN KEY ("item_code") REFERENCES items ("item_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical record */,
  "item_code" TEXT /* Reference to the item */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date the record was made */,
  "buying_price" REAL /* Buying price at the time of the record */,
  "selling_price" REAL /* Selling price at the time of the record */,
  "margin" REAL /* Margin at the time of the record */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the price change (e.g., supplier, internal adjustment) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_history_item_code FOREIGN KEY ("item_code") REFERENCES items ("item_code")
)
